textByHash.0b6e4e932d75209296bce8a2b6d5b98f83af7463: As a loyal customer of the Lovakengj Minecart Network, you're entitled to this.
textByHash.93ed17d17d2c1945d73e8b479f717a3e5094a311: Now, can I help you today?
textByHash.f195804ac824521d1ae0ee7b4547ffc8dc42e8f3: Hello, human. Can I help you?
textByHash.9e3e7668040a1eb3f039e00a6410898eb05e7ab2: This is the principal station of the Lovakengj Minecart Network. Once it's running, our people will be able to travel rapidly all across the city.
textByHash.29ba47b73ee5f74a8c54b2905885a29d99832942: The network is for the citizens of Lovakengj only, though I'll let you use it if you help me first. Free up some inventory space if you're interested.
textByHash.e25267e98159eb9f87344a7672cff0e3d5c71297: The network is for the citizens of Lovakengj only, though I'll let you use it if you help me first.
textByHash.ad875d922f33377b412abba563204840038bb137: The workers at the other stations got incorrect versions of the control scrolls, so they can't operate the minecarts. Please take these updated scrolls to them.
textByHash.239cecee93858dc80eee15f60db92a3968d078a8: That's one scroll each for the Arceuus station, the Shayzien station, the Hosidius station, the Piscarilius station and the Quidamortem station.
textByHash.29be0c3e71982e38403d046b5d606fc782b7f438: The Arceuus station is just next to the Arceuus Library, in the north of the city.
textByHash.72933b617a823479eb566f1a8679b42de8377902: The Shayzien station is east of the Shayzien Encampment.
textByHash.34d61a725351fea0112668e5fdc065c23fcb26aa: The Hosidius station is north of the Woodcutting Guild.
textByHash.f7541a88ed010ed6b6c65ce86b33cce7fbe13563: The Piscarilius station is south of the city, next to a small mine.
textByHash.289045818809a8a3a7f347171c0081cfde39defd: The Quidamortem station is at the peak of the mountain, deep in the Kebos Lowlands.
textByHash.e5bf42ac4acb1f0295a57e02bd6fa27c0c0fc24c: No, you haven't unlocked any of the other stations yet.
textByHash.e05a78671e95bf4996ed911a0e33cb8b91a47c16: Hmmm... We normally charge 50 coins per ride. For 100,000 coins, you'll never have to pay again.
textByHash.c4a94449dc26cc70d90fe95d1a33930a42498aa3: Take it or leave it, human! You may enjoy being about to ride our carts without having to carry coins every time.
textByHash.0ff004db98e6179e95c98d4cc85d5def4a2c758b: Can I do anything else for you, human?
textByHash.0022b2dfa9bfe12d6a239e11be999b8ee98318a9: Some of my stations still require control scrolls.
textByHash.1b4eb60d38f8b766591c5ee50db18bfd4ceeec10: Yes, but you don't have room in your inventory.
textByHash.c07dd14938d2dd74b43595bd2686bc1d0dd62487: No thanks, I don't want it back.
textByHash.e753a9f757ce013c85621d704bbecaee0bf8dccb: Thanks for delivering those control scrolls, human. What can I do for you today?
